description: The Caracal proved to be a popular vessel among independent salvagers for its capacity and versatility when it was first introduced. These same qualities saw the vessel quickly adopted for piracy in signficant numbers, forcing Testudo to introduce more stringent background checks on potential buyers in 2043 that have made ships of this model hard to come by.
